headline: Bank of America Securities Maintains Buy Rating on Quanta Services (PWR) Stock
summary: Quanta Services, Inc. (NYSE:PWR) is one of the Best Multibagger Stocks to Buy for Long Term. On April 1, analyst Sherif El-Sabbahy from Bank of America Securities maintained a “Buy” rating on the company’s stock and kept the price objective at $610.00. headline: AI Power Boom Is 'Accelerating' As Goldman Sachs Forecasts Data Center's Demand To Surge 220% By 2030
